note: Implemented offline-first data loading strategy. Added connectivity_plus dependency. Created EventsNotifier (AsyncNotifier) that loads from SQLite cache first, fetches API in background, and auto-syncs on connectivity restore via connectivity_plus. Created StaleDataBanner widget showing offline/stale indicator. Updated HomeScreen to use new provider with stale banner. All code passes dart analyze with no issues. Files: lib/providers/events_provider.dart (new), lib/widgets/stale_data_banner.dart (new), lib/screens/home_screen.dart (updated), lib/services/services.dart (updated), lib/widgets/widgets.dart (updated), pubspec.yaml (updated).
